message:
test(parser): bd-3kin DDL gap-fill tests for REINDEX, ANALYZE, qualified names

Add 21 parser assertion + roundtrip tests covering DDL gaps:
- REINDEX/ANALYZE: global, table name, and qualified (schema.name) forms
- DROP IF EXISTS for VIEW, INDEX, TRIGGER; qualified DROP TABLE/TRIGGER
- CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS and CREATE TEMP TRIGGER
- CREATE VIEW with qualified name; ALTER TABLE with qualified name
- Extended roundtrip coverage for all DDL forms

Add bd-3kin compliance gate tests (3 tests). Parser total: 389 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
